generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for contract logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Component implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
